frames: The agent is in a low, splayed posture with all four limbs on the ground, appearing stable.
The agent's body slightly shifts forward, and the front-left limb briefly lifts and touches down.
The agent maintains a low posture, with its body slightly rocking and limbs adjusting contact with the ground.
The agent's body lowers further, almost touching the ground, with all four limbs spread wide.
The agent begins to lift its body, pushing off the ground, with the front-left limb rising.
The agent's body is now significantly elevated, and it is rotating counter-clockwise, with some limbs off the ground.
The agent continues to rotate and lift, balancing precariously on its rear limbs, with its body tilted.
The agent is mostly upright, balancing on two limbs, with its body highly tilted and rotating, appearing unstable.
